summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one explicit carry-through from the prior chapter's sleepless overnight ending, and one exit timing adjustment to make the cut into chapter_08's night setting read cleaner without changing plot events.
edits: Added a one-line opening bridge clarifying that Faye has not gone to bed, reinforcing continuity from chapter_06's overnight ending.
Adjusted the closing time-of-day imagery so the chapter exits into full dark with the cold settling, supporting the night handoff into chapter_08.
